title: Everbuild Stick2 Superglue High Viscosity – Suitable for DIY & Professional Projects – Industrial Grade – High Strength – Rapid Setting – Clear – 50g
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: RAPID SETTING – Sets in less than 60 seconds for a high-strength bond between your non-porous and non-porous materials.
SOLVENT-FREE – This water-based glue is solvent-free and uses safer advanced cyanoacrylate technology.
THICKER FORMULA – The HV high viscosity formula has a slightly longer setting time and therefore better fills gaps up to 0.25mm wide between your materials.
VERSATILE – Suitable for professional and DIY use on multiple porous and non-porous surfaces, including MDF, rubber, metals, PVCu, plastic and more.
AVAILABLE IN MULTIPLE SIZES – Bottle sizes include 20g and 50g.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? The surfaces to be glued should be clean, dry and free from dust, grease and other contaminants. Apply adhesive to one surface only. Press surfaces together and hold for 10 seconds or as indicated below. Cure speed is rapid so exercise care when aligning. Setting time range: 15-40 seconds plastic to plastic 10-15 seconds rubber to rubber 10-60 seconds degreased metal to metal
